LRMSAccounts.title: LRMS Administrative Accounts Document
LRMSAccounts.description: Contains the array of administrative accounts for the LRMS system.

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of the last synchronization.

LRMSMissingLicenses.title: LRMS Missing Licenses Document
LRMSMissingLicenses.description: Contains the list of missing licenses added by staff.

LRMSFoundLicenses.title: LRMS Found Licenses Document
LRMSFoundLicenses.description: Contains the list of historical records showing how missing licenses were resolved, when, and who received them.

/lrms_system/{systemId}.description: Stores system administrative configurations such as accounts, missing licenses, or found registry lists.
